name: 99 Minutos

name: Ali Tech

name: Alterestate

name: Apparta

name: Apphive

name: Avify
description: CRM for SBMs in LATAM

name: Avioneta

The company's system offers features such as anti-fraud security, frictionless mobile transfers, resale control, and a unique ability to generate new revenue and communication opportunities, enabling large companies and SMEs dedicated to artistic entertainment and recreation activities to control, display and manage smart digital tickets, generating trust and maximizing the transactional experience.

name: Raw Apothecary
description: Manufacturer of natural skincare products intended to rediscover beauty without stereotypes. The company's products are formulated using materials that are developed from extracted plants, seeds, and flowers without preservatives, fragrances, or harmful chemicals, enabling women and men to look good and feel confident with beauty products made out of authentic natural touch.

name: Reliv
description: Developer of healthcare management platform designed to integrate doctors, patients, insurance, and pharmacies. The company's platform offers appointment management, calendar management, automatic reminder, electronic billing, cloud clinical history, and inventory management, enabling users to gain access to a simple and seamless interaction.

name: RetLiq
description: Reverse Logistics; simplified

name: Revie
description: Developer of information-providing platform designed to share reviews of e-commerce websites through WhatsApp. The company specializes in sharing user-generated text, photos and audio and automation of marketing campaigns and helps to drive sales by collecting user feedback and UGC for e-commerce platforms via WhatsApp, enabling clients to increase the number of reviews on their e-commerce and make informed decisions.

name: Ruedata
description: Developer of fleet management software designed to manage and optimize the savings of the tires. The company's software uses data analysis technology and automated learning algorithms to offer maintenance, compliance planning, and abnormal wear and cost overrun data, enabling clients to increase the profitability of their transport fleet by having updated information online.

name: Ruka.ai
description: AI agents automating SMBs

name: RUUT
description: Developer of an investment platform intended to bridge the gap between Mexicans with a digital banking account and people with a personal investment account for non-investors. The company offers a simple, intuitive, and commission-free beginner-friendly product, with investment advisory, newsfeed, and an impact investment tracker, enabling investors with a simple, low-cost, and long-term holding incentive structure.

name: Sapiens Medicus
description: Esculapio is your 24/7 voice‑first full-stack AI doctor that offers you personalized care.

name: Scape
description: B2B2C wellness tech marketplace in Latin America (soon US)

name: Scorce
description: Developer of API tools designed to analyze compliance, obtain finance data, validate personal data, digital onboarding, fraud prevention, credit scoring, and alternative data. The company's tools perform rapid risk assessments of potential clients or users and analyze multiple factors by creating a score based on the risk associated with that particular e-mail, enabling customers to borrow loans by preventing fraud and chargebacks.

name: Scouter
description: Operator of an online property rental platform intended to provide vacation properties. The company's platform offers properties for various events such as workshops, parties, shooting, etc, and also allows owners to rent out their property via its platform, enabling users to book properties according to their requirements.

name: SeeMexico
description: Operator of an online travel agency intended to help customers in planning and exploring places during their tours. The company's agency helps find travel deals, and hotels and offers a subscription model and installment payment option for the trips, enabling travelers to pay in smaller amounts and also discover different regions in the country.

name: Shopeando
description: Provider of logistics services intended to simplify buying products directly from big Chinese e-commerce websites. The company's services offer delivery services of personal and business import products directly to the customer's doorsteps, enabling customers to get their desired products at the right time and place.

name: Shuttle Central
description: Operator of an online mobility and transportation platform intended to help travel companies boost revenue by offering add-ons to their customers starting with airport rides. The company's platform connects local transportation services into one place and provides them with the necessary technology, enabling travelers to move easily around the world.

name: Simpliroute
description: Developer of a navigation platform designed for route optimization services. The company's platform provides ways to help any last-mile company make their deliveries efficiently by automating their process with an easy-to-use platform and automates their process with an easy-to-use platform, enabling businesses to organize their deliveries and visits with minimum effort.

name: Sioma
description: Developer of a precision agriculture system designed to help farmers increase their productivity. The company's system helps to know and increase the area traveled by workers in the field, and helps to carry the inventory of bunches automatically, offers an integrated control system that allows organizing the exact boxes that are going to export in such a way that they are not overweight, enabling users to improve the internal processes of their crops.

name: Slik
description: We provide organizations with cloud-based surveys and analytics to measure and improve employee engagement.

name: Spider Fleet
description: Provider of a fleet management system created to evaluate driving performance and control fuel consumption. The company's system offers total monitoring of operator management behaviors, real-time geolocation of vehicles, intelligent routes and itineraries tracking, and fuel control and maintenance, enabling customers to radically improve the management of commercial and private vehicle fleets.

name: Sportwey
description: Developer of a sports search platform intended to create, manage and find amateur sports tournaments. The company's platform offers tools for managing various aspects of a sports tournament including communication, payment, notifications, calendar integration, application and registration management, enabling athletes to connect with local tournaments easily every day.

name: Super Seguros
description: Operator of a multi-product insurance platform intended to emphasize the understanding, pricing, and use of insurance. The company's platform focuses on offering predefined cover amounts paid when the insurance conditions are met and simplifying such conditions in order to honor the promise to pay, enabling clients to avail of insurance with confidence and support.

name: Syscap
description: Developer of a financial platform dedicated to connecting the leaders of financial and real estate institutions with their funders. The company ensures the optimization of funding source management processes and offers tailored analysis and reporting along with timely monitoring of funds, it helps in building infrastructure, and providing access to private credit, enabling managers and funders to empower and connect underwriters, borrowers, and investors together in a data-rich and streamlined ecosystem.

name: Takenos
description: Operator of a blockchain-based payment platform designed to offer cross-border workers to access their earnings instantly in cash or crypto. The company offers an international digital wallet to receive income from anywhere in the world and dispose of it as per preference, enabling users to receive payment from the company or platform they are working at.

name: Talently
description: Developer of an educational platform intended to accelerate the professional development of Latin American technical talents. The company's platform offers training for English language and technical issues, job and interview information, skills assessment, and mock interviews, enabling customers to get suitable jobs in software development, anywhere in the world.

name: Tarefa
description: Operator of a digital educational platform designed to help students to improve their learning skills. The company's platform offers courses on a subscription basis, connects students with professional teachers in order to teach, solve and provide answers to users' math exercises, enabling students to post their difficult queries to be solved online in an efficient manner.

name: TAXO
description: Developer of taxation software designed to create a tailored system for accountants. The company's software specializes in offering taxation, tracking, automation, and communication tools, and a client terminal as well as shares tax reports and invoices, and triggers email alerts, enabling accountants to communicate with their colleagues and clients and manage their work.

name: TEDI
description: Operator of an online educational platform aimed at developing and improving student's education. The company's platform provides a variety of services and educational programs that prioritize developing critical-analytical knowledge to be able to apply it in real projects, are available and recorded that can be viewed around the clock, have flexible study hours, providing the students, to grow professional their path together with teachers with great experience in the world of construction and as well as course completion certificates.

name: Terapify
description: Operator of an online therapy platform intended for the Spanish-speaking market. The company's platform offers online psychotherapy sessions attended by clinical psychologists who provide counseling on topics that include anxiety, stress, depression, couple problems, self-esteem issues, personal development and sexuality, enabling users to connect with psychologists online to regain and maintain their emotional stability.

name: Think Parametric
description: Developer of online education platform designed for the architectural, engineering, and construction industry. The company helps students and professionals learn the latest technologies and implement them in the execution of their projects to create better buildings, enabling users to learn a new way of thinking and approaching design and how to implement new skills.

name: Trato
description: Developer of a contract lifecycle management software intended to simplify and automate legal processes. The company's platform leverages blockchain to automate the flow of contracts including the creation, collaboration, use of electronic signatures, and monitoring, enabling financial institutions and law firms to manage, execute, and report all types of contracts feasibly.

name: Uniko
description: Operator of an online gift registry platform intended to assist couples to receive wedding gifts. The company's platform provides engaged couples tools to manage their registries and gives them the ability to ask for and receive cash in the lieu of household gifts, enabling couples to exchange gifts for cash or even receive customized gifts on the day of their wedding.

name: Venzee
description: Venzee Technologies Inc is engaged in developing software infrastructure retailers. It develops and markets a cloud-based platform that suppliers and manufacturers from multiple industries use to share their product information and inventory updates, in real-time, with their retailers. The Company operates in one operating segment, which is a cloud-based platform solution targeted to online retailers and vendors. Geographically, the company generates a majority of revenue from the United States.

name: Vico
description: Operator of a room and apartment searching platform designed to help students find their shared housing. The company's platform offers a wide variety of places to choose from according to preferences and conditions that are verified by a lease contract, allowing young professionals to find their new shared home and integrate themselves into the new culture.

name: Vioo
description: Operator of a visual content creation marketplace intended to provide visual content for business projects. The company's marketplace matches professionals specialized in photography, video, virtual reality, drone, or rendering based on project requirements, enabling businesses to reduce manhours and expenses and concentrate on core functions.

name: WeiBook
description: Developer of a software application designed for operational and financial management of beauty businesses in Latin America. The company's application offers a booking button to Instagram profile, set up a website that showcases services and make it easy for clients to pay for their appointments with the app's wallet, enabling businesses to increase revenue.

name: Wited (Portal Educativo)
description: Developer of an online educational network designed to deliver quality, engaging, and accessible education to students. The company's platform offers online interactive courses for kids from elementary through high school, enabling individual students to receive personalized educational assistance and thus improve their performance.

name: Wombo
description: Operator of a training and coaching platform intended to encourage community gaming. The company's platform creates an environment that brings together online players in the same learning environment and fans wanting to increase their in-game performance and compete with their peers, and pro players wanting to monetize their experience and knowledge through coaching, enabling gamers access courses, personalized coaching and other experiences with esports experts and watch and enjoy various sports and games.

name: Woowup
description: Developer of a cloud-based online marketing platform designed for automating customer retention campaigns and leveraging existing customer data. The company's platform converts the fans of a company into customers using a loyalty program on the website of the company or the Facebook fan page, allows integration with any sales channel, identifies the user as a single channel, and manages all point purchase and redemption interactions, enabling retailers to retain customers using automated marketing tools and artificial intelligence to predict purchases.

name: Yana
description: Developer of an emotional wellbeing chatbot designed to accompany people who have anxiety, and depression and seek to better their mental health. The company offers an automated conversational agent to evaluate user's moods to understand their day-to-day life and the factors associated with their mood, and daily conversations related to that mood, enabling users to tackle negative thoughts and behaviors any day, at any time

name: Yetcargo
description: Developer of a logistics platform designed to connect carriers with cargo owners. The company provides real-time tracking of cargo and claims to have a portfolio of reliable carriers, enabling businesses in product shipment and transportation by connecting and dealing with air and marine logistics service providers.

name: Yo Fio
description: Developer of microcredit application designed for purchases at informal corner stores. The company's application scans QR codes to show the details of the products being bought and authorizes the purchase by notifying the store and provides credit facilities to corner stores through the app and in partnership with the store gives credit lines to the store customers, enabling customers to buy today and pay in a month.

name: Ziro
description: Operator of credit business payments marketplace intended to offer financial services to B2B, BNPL service, manufacturers, wholesalers, and B2B suppliers. The company's platform offers features like options to pay in installments, improve repurchase rates, check purchase history, and pre-approved credit limit, helping clients by offering flexible payment options so that they can improve their cash flow and grow their businesses.

name: Zolvers
description: Operator of an online platform intended to connect customers with service providers for errands. The company's marketplace helps people to outsource errands such as cleaning, home or office maintenance, and any short pending task, enabling people to complete housework at a reasonable cost.

name: Okol
description: Operator of a property listings platform designed to empower real estate consumers to find the ideal place to live, to undertake and to enjoy. The company's platform focuses on transparency, efficiency and boost the real estate market and urban development in the country through technology and also present graphs with prices and other data to make comparison easier, enabling citizens to find an intelligent way, a community and a home to develop their lives.

name: Doodle Mobile
description: Provider of an online gaming platform designed to offer mobile games. The company's platform develops and publishes mobile social games for android-based devices, enabling game enthusiasts to download them and play with their friends.

name: Visor
description: Provider of an acquisition, customer management and dynamic profiling platform intended to offer services to financial institutions in SME lending. The company's acquisition, customer management and dynamic profiling platform identifies and extends credit to SMEs in high volumes via exclusive origination channels built via strategic partnerships with large enterprises and it also gains access to the SME's information cashflow information from reliable sources and its data analytics generates a credit and business profile for these SMEs, enabling financial institutions to prioritizes on boarding, tigers event-based marketing and predict customer behavior in and gain insights related to propensity, behavior and credit worthiness.

name: Wishbird Experiences
description: Developer of an online marketplace designed to offer gift items to the people. The company's online marketplace offers activity gifts online like diving, paragliding, rafting, hot air balloon flights, exclusive spas and many more for women and men, enabling clients to increase engagement and loyalty with their stakeholders.

name: The Other Guys
description: Operator of a mobile and social games studio intended to develop immersive mobile games. The company's mobile and social games models are based on virtual goods and micro-transactions with strong storytelling features and delivered in episodes, which are free to play and available for download on mobile and computer devices, enabling game players to enjoy social story telling games

name: Mi Dulce Hogar
description: Provider of cleaning services intended to clean home, office or business from one day to each week by experts. The company's services facilitate the online request of cleaning and payments with different packages by quick and reliable technology, enabling clients to schedule the cleanliness of their places easily in a cost-effective manner.

name: Mision Admision
description: Developer of an online educational platform. The company offers university and college entrance examination preparation courses to students online.

name: Yaydoo
description: Provider of an office management platform designed to connect online retailers with customers. The company's digital concierge marketplace application uses chat bots and personalized interaction tools to manage expenses and accounting, simplify purchase decision and more, enabling customers to find and buy products from online retailers based their individual demand.

name: VivaReal
description: Provider of an online real estate marketplace designed to help thousands of people to find their dream house. The company's online real estate marketplace connects buyers, sellers and renters with the properties they are interested in, enabling them to avail profitable real estate deals.

name: Shopline
description: Developer of a DIY e-commerce platform designed to create online shops for merchants in Asia. The company's e-commerce platform allows merchants to apply for one free custom domain for their shop and provides professional and well-designed to customize their storefront, enabling them to launch an online shop in minutes, no coding required.
